gpu: AMD Radeon RX 6800 XT (navi21, LLVM 14.0.6, DRM 3.48, 6.0.8-zen1-1-zen)

notes: I tried a couple different proton versions, including Experimental, Hotfix, Proton GE 55, and Proton 7.0-6 (the one that I know works with desktop Linux) and they all failed to launch. To troubleshoot, I tested it on my Linux desktop and it worked perfectly. Using [gamescope](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/gamescope) I manually set the resolution of steam to the dimensions of the steam deck (1280 x 800px), and then it wouldn't work. For some reason, even overriding the resolution in the properties (General → game resolution) doesn't resolve the problem even with "Set resolution for internal and external display" checked.
